stylePrompt: Create a completely original Romantic Minimalist lighting product that balances a clean restrained base with one poetic, feminine, or delicately crafted gesture. Replace cold rectilinear minimalism with controlled folds, lace-like perforation, petal edges, or soft classical references. The design should feel emotionally warm and quietly dramatic, never cluttered, saccharine, or faux-antique. Preserve contemporary construction and practical light quality.
specificElements: A single ruffled edge around a pure diffuser
A lace-like perforated metal shadow layer
A classical chandelier proportion reduced to one line
A folded fabric form translated into glass
A delicate carved detail on an otherwise plain body
A floating petal shade above a minimal stem
metalTranslationPrompt: Balance clean metal silhouettes with poetic details: softly ruffled spun-metal edges, lace-like laser-cut patterns used sparingly, milk-white coating, champagne brass, and one refined classical focal detail.
